import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut sorted = true
  mut in_num = false
  mut neg = false
  mut cur = 0
  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if in_num
        let val = if neg
          0 - cur
        else
          cur
        end
        if have_prev
          if val < prev
            sorted = false
          end
        end
        prev = val
        have_prev = true
        in_num = false
        neg = false
        cur = 0
      end
    else
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        neg = false
        cur = 0
        if b == 45
          neg = true
        else if b == 43
          neg = false
        else
          cur = b - 48
        end
      else
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if sorted
    print("YES")
  else
    print("NO")
  end
end
